headline: Dollar General: The Trade-In Thesis Still Intact
summary: Dollar General's Q1 2026 showed 3.4% net sales growth, positive traffic, broad-based category strength, and GM expansion to 31.6%. Click for more on DG stock.

headline: Popular discount retailer gets rid of key store section
summary: Discount retailers are in a difficult position. Many shoppers are still looking for low prices and quick deals, but that does not mean every discount chain is winning. Dollar Tree’s long struggle since its acquisition of Family Dollar has shown how difficult the sector has become. The ...
